_review_reason: Centurion is invitation-only with $5,000 annual fee + $10,000 initiation. Amex publishes minimal public benefit details. Recurring credits exist (per industry knowledge: hotel/airline/dining/lifestyle credits) but specific dollar amounts and conditions are confidential. Cannot fill this without authoritative source. Manual research via cardholder forums (FlyerTalk) or Amex insider relationship needed.
